title_en: Police seize weapons cache at Coutts; charges laid
title_fr: La police saisit une cache d'armes à Coutts; des accusations sont portées
description_en: RCMP seized firearms and ammunition at Coutts and laid charges including serious conspiracy charges. Outcomes varied: two accused were later acquitted of conspiracy to commit murder while being convicted on other counts. Charges are not convictions.
